main.description: Get a blob referenced by a record in a permissioned repo. Returns the full blob as originally uploaded. Requires a covering OAuth scope or a space credential; implemented by a repo host.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

did.description: The DID of the account that authored the blob's referencing record.

cid.description: The CID of the blob to fetch.
